intelligence.currentFocus: Session 87 closed (recovery writeback at S88 start). All S86 carry-forward items cleared. Live now: repo-wide lint gate (lint-repo.mjs catches conflict markers + committed secrets pre-push); voice-leak patrol complete (trust-depth.js + adaptive-cta.js scrubbed of internal enum/signal language); Voidfall lore-gate fragments live (rank-2 + rank-4 on /universe/voidfall/); studio-pulse-live.js broadcasts to vault:events on real shipments; all 8 game pages emit VideoGame JSON-LD via schema-injector; native-feel + ignis-lens + schema-injector propagated site-wide to 105 HTML files; all 79 public-page og:image tags now point at the dynamic /_og/ worker with per-page title/eyebrow/status. Full S86 runtime stack still live: ask-ignis + Vault Oracle + IGNIS Lens; edge-gate + rate-limit + nonce CSP + /_csrf on Cloudflare Worker; og-image-worker on /_og/* zone route.
